---
title: "social_support_for_eating_habits"
subtitle: "`social_support_for_eating_habits`"
description: "social_support_for_eating_habits"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/social_support_for_eating_habits/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                               | Title                            | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|------------------------------------|----------------------------------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                            | The unique name of the event     | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                     |
| `center`                           | Research center                  | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `ssfeh_family_unhealthy_food`      | ssfeh_family_unhealthy_food      | string | Participant's report of family encouraging them not to eat unhealthy foods (e.g., cake, salty chips) when they feel like it. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).  |
| `ssfeh_friends_unhealthy_food`     | ssfeh_friends_unhealthy_food     | string | Participant's report of friends encouraging them not to eat unhealthy foods (e.g., cake, salty chips) when they feel like it. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `ssfeh_family_diet_change`         | ssfeh_family_diet_change         | string | Participant's report of family discussing their dietary changes (asking how the changes are going). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                           |
| `ssfeh_friends_diet_change`        | ssfeh_friends_diet_change        | string | Participant's report of friends discussing their dietary changes (asking how the changes are going). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                          |
| `ssfeh_family_fat_salt`            | ssfeh_family_fat_salt            | string | Participant's report of being reminded not to eat foods high in fat or salt from family. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                      |
| `ssfeh_friends_fat_salt`           | ssfeh_friends_fat_salt           | string | Participant's report of being reminded not to eat foods high in fat or salt from friends. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                     |
| `ssfeh_family_compliments`         | ssfeh_family_compliments         | string | Participant's report of receiving compliments for changing eating habits from family. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                         |
| `ssfeh_friends_compliments`        | ssfeh_friends_compliments        | string | Participant's report of receiving compliments for changing eating habits from friends. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                        |
| `ssfeh_family_comments`            | ssfeh_family_comments            | string | Participant's report of family members commenting when they have reverted to old eating habits. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                               |
| `ssfeh_friends_comment`            | ssfeh_friends_comment            | string | Participant's report of friends commenting when they have reverted to old eating habits. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                      |
| `ssfeh_family_eat_unhealthy`       | ssfeh_family_eat_unhealthy       | string | Participant's report of family members eating foods high in fat or salt in front of them. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                     |
| `ssfeh_friends_eat_unhealthy`      | ssfeh_friends_eat_unhealthy      | string | Participant's report of friends eating foods high in fat or salt in front of them. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                            |
| `ssfeh_family_refuse_same_food`    | ssfeh_family_refuse_same_food    | string | Participant's report of family members refusing to eat the same foods as them. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                |
| `ssfeh_friends_refuse_same_food`   | ssfeh_friends_refuse_same_food   | string | Participant's report of friends refusing to eat the same foods as them. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                       |
| `ssfeh_family_brought_food_avoid`  | ssfeh_family_brought_food_avoid  | string | Participant's report of family members bringing home foods the participant is trying to avoid. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                |
| `ssfeh_friends_brought_food_avoid` | ssfeh_friends_brought_food_avoid | string | Participant's report of friends bringing foods the participant is trying to avoid. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                            |
| `ssfeh_family_angry`               | ssfeh_family_angry               | string | Participant's report of family members becoming angry when encouraged to eat foods low in fat and salt. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                       |
| `ssfeh_friends_amgry`              | ssfeh_friends_amgry              | string | Participant's report of friends becoming angry when encouraged to eat foods low in fat and salt. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                              |
| `ssfeh_family_offered_food`        | ssfeh_family_offered_food        | string | Participant's report of family members offering foods the participant is trying to avoid. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                     |
| `ssfeh_friends_offered_food`       | ssfeh_friends_offered_food       | string | Participant's report of friends offering foods the participant is trying to avoid. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                            |
| `ssfeh_comments_participant`       | ssfeh_comments_participant       | string | Participant's free-text comments about the questionnaire. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                     |

: Fields in the `social_support_for_eating_habits` resource.
